title: Support - Help Guide no wifi [New]
scenario: Help Guide in Lens app shows "Something went wrong" error when Wi-Fi is off, and Cancel button returns to Support screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure Wi-Fi is turned off on the Android device.
4. Tap on the Support option (or navigate to Support from the menu).
5. On the Support screen, tap on Help Guide.
expected: The Help Guide should load properly or display a meaningful offline message indicating no internet connection.
